title: Fractional CMO
description: Senior growth leadership for post-PMF startups that need clearer GTM, better acquisition decisions, and more predictable pipeline.
audience: Best for Seed to Series B teams that need senior growth leadership alongside founders, teams, agencies, or existing marketing hires.
promise: You get a senior operator owning priorities, reporting, team direction, and the decisions behind what to scale, stop, or fix.
outcomes: Growth priorities, reporting, and weekly operating rhythm
Founder messaging and investor narrative support
Team rituals that reduce founder bottleneck
process: Diagnose current constraints and team capacity
Set quarterly growth priorities and decision rules
Guide execution across research, campaigns, and conversion
Document the system so the team gets stronger over time
